inputs.label: Slope Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the slope face measured from horizontal

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of the slope face measured from horizontal
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel der Böschungsfläche, gemessen von der Horizontalen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de la face de la pente mesuré par rapport à l'horizontale
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de la cara del talud medido desde la horizontal
businessContext_i18n.ar: زاوية وجه الميل مقاسة من الأفقي

inputs.label: Friction Angle (φ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle of internal friction of soil

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of internal friction of soil
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel der inneren Reibung des Bodens
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de frottement interne du sol
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de fricción interna del suelo

inputs.label: Depth to Failure Plane (z)
inputs.businessContext: Vertical depth from slope surface to potential failure plane

label_i18n.es: Profundidad hasta el plano de falla (z)

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical depth from slope surface to potential failure plane (assuming parallel to slope)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şev yüzeyinden potansiyel kırılma düzlemine düşey derinlik (şeve paralel olduğu varsayılır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Tiefe von der Böschungsoberfläche zur potenziellen Gleitfläche (parallel zur Böschung angenommen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur verticale de la surface de la pente au plan de rupture potentiel (en supposant parallèle à la pente)
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad vertical desde la superficie del talud hasta el plano de falla potencial (asumiendo paralelo al talud)
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمق الرأسي من سطح المنحدر إلى سطح الانهيار المحتمل (بافتراض التوازي مع المنحدر)

inputs.label: Pore Pressure Ratio (rᵤ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of pore water pressure to overburden stress

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of pore water pressure to overburden stress (0 for dry, 0.25–0.5 for saturated)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boşluk suyu basıncının örtü yüküne oranı (kuru için 0, doygun için 0.25–0.5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von Porenwasserdruck zur Überlagerungsspannung (0 für trocken, 0,25–0,5 für gesättigt)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport de la pression interstitielle à la contrainte de surcharge (0 pour sec, 0,25–0,5 pour saturé)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre la presión de agua intersticial y el esfuerzo de sobrecarga (0 para seco, 0.25–0.5 para saturado)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضغط ماء المسام إلى إجهاد الحمل الزائد (0 للجاف، 0.25–0.5 للمشبع)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Slope angle must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
Friction angle must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
Pore pressure ratio must be between 0 and 1.
